name: Lizard peninsula — go south around it
description: Mount's Bay to Falmouth Bay — direct line crosses the Lizard, must go south around it

name: Open water baseline — no obstacles
description: Lyme Bay — open water, no land in direct path

name: Start Point — go around headland
description: South of Start Point to Tor Bay — must go around headland

name: Dartmoor inland start — should fail
description: Start on Dartmoor (> 1 NM from coast) — isochrone collapses immediately

name: Eddystone to Channel — no obstacles
description: Eddystone area to Start Bay — open water south of Cornwall coast

name: Lyme Bay — 0.5NM clearance margin
description: Open water route with 0.5NM clearance — should stay well offshore
